title: thelypteris lineata
intro: Thelypteris lineata, also known as the linear lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris lineata include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's fronds are typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
